segments.text:
Old ways
Hard truths
Built on the rock of a heavy youth
We see your face in the mirror
Looking for a way back home
Trying to find something clearer
Walking this path alone
Tough love
Wide arms
Shielding your soul from the modern harms
Come back to the fold
Safe inside the fence
Doing what we are told
Losing every defense
We love you too much to let you go
We love you too much to say it's right
Too much to let you go
Too much to say it's right
Back to the family
Back to the light
We love you too much
We love you too much
The sound of belonging is here tonight
Too much
Too much
Wrong turns
Cold rain
Washing away every secret stain
Stop
Listen
Faith is a gift that you might have missing
Hard to swallow
Bitter pill
Climbing up the steepest hill
Iron gate
Open wide
Nowhere left for you to hide
Pure heart
White sand
Sifting the grain with a steady hand
We love you too much to let you go
We love you too much to say it's right
Too much to let you go
Too much to say it's right
Back to the family
Back to the light
We love you too much
We love you too much
The sound of belonging is here tonight
Too much
Too much
We pray for you
We fast for you
We wait for you
Until the morning
Until the healing
Until the turning
Give it up
Put it down
Wear the crown
The old you is dead and gone
We love you too much to let you go
We love you too much to say it's right
Too much to let you go
Too much to say it's right
Back to the family
Back to the light
We love you too much
We love you too much
The sound of belonging is here tonight
Too much
Too much
Too much
Too much
Safe now
Home now
Finally one of us
Don't look back
Never look back
We love you too much
We love you too much
